about.title: About Me
about.bio:
Born in Bari in 1998, I'm a Back-end Developer at DXC Technology with a passion for clean code and scalable architectures.

I work daily with Java Spring Boot to build robust back-end services, integrating them with relational databases like Oracle and PostgreSQL, and event-driven messaging systems like Apache Kafka and RabbitMQ.

In my spare time I explore the world of artificial intelligence, experiment with Python and FastAPI, and stay up to date with the latest in PC hardware and videogames.
